The Fitna Club Community

Fitna is more than
a workout.

Community Life

Where women support each other.

The name Fitna Club carries a vision: a space where women feel genuinely seen, supported, and connected — not just coached through reps. Community has been one of the four pillars since the beginning.

Members stay accountable together, celebrate each other's milestones, and gather regularly for things that have nothing to do with exercise — because the women who train here are whole people, not just clients.

Follow @fitna.club
💪
Online & In-Person TrainingStructured sessions across all formats, with consistent progress tracking.
📋
Food & Workout AccountabilityRegular check-ins, goal-setting, and supportive feedback to keep you consistent.
📱
Educational ContentPractical wellness knowledge shared regularly on @fitna.club Instagram.
🎬
Movie & Book DiscussionsMonthly community gatherings — because connection and joy are part of living well.
🌸
Women's Wellness SupportA safe space to talk menopause, hormones, body changes, and everything in between.
